statement: In every magma, Equation 1164 (`x = y * ((z * (y * x)) * y)`) implies Equation 4660 (`(x * y) * y = (y * z) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0917
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op y x)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op (op x y) y) = (op (op y z) x)
